title: Saying Goodbye 道别
scene: 暑假结束了，两个好朋友在机场道别。

lines.en: Mike, I can't believe the summer holiday is over.
lines.zh: 迈克，真不敢相信暑假结束了。

lines.en: Me neither. I had such a great time with you.
lines.zh: 我也是。和你在一起玩得真开心。

lines.en: I'm going to miss you so much!
I will miss you too. We had so much fun together.
lines.zh: 我也会想你的。我们在一起玩得真开心。

lines.en: Please write to me when you get home.
I will. And let's video chat every weekend!
lines.zh: 我会的。我们每个周末视频聊天吧！

lines.en: I won't. Take care of yourself, Anna.
lines.zh: 不会忘的。照顾好自己，安娜。

lines.en: You too, Mike. Have a safe trip home.
Goodbye, Anna! See you next summer!
